REASON: Gil Vicente's PPG (1.85) and xG (1.64) significantly outperform AVS's (0.31 PPG, 1.06 xG). Bookmaker odds (1.33) strongly favor Gil Vicente. No conflicting data points regarding this outcome.
CONCLUSION: Home Win.
